title: Table file persistence
description: Given a table backed by a directory, when I put a record it should be written to a JSON file on disk. Filename convention: {pk}.json for simple PKs, {partition}__{sort}.json for composite PKs. PKs containing path separators (/ or \) are rejected. When I delete, the file should be removed. Load reads all JSON files from the directory. All writes use atomic temp+rename. Non-JSON files are ignored. Spec: features/core/table_file_persistence.feature
